debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
net : BiasedHopfieldNetwork n
x : HopfieldState n
i : Fin n
⊢ biasedUpdateState n net x i ≠ x → biasedLocalField n net x i ≠ 0 → biasedEnergyDiff n net x i < 0

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro hne hlf
  have h0 : biasedEnergyDiff net x i ≠ 0 := by
    intro hEq
    have h :=
      biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField (net := net) (x := x) (i := i)
    have h' :
        -((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i = 0 := by
      simpa [biasedEnergyDiff, hEq] using congrArg id h
    have hmul0 :
        ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i = 0 := by
      have : -(((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i) = 0 := by
        simpa using h'
      simpa using (neg_eq_zero.mp this)
    have hdiff0 :
        ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) = 0 := by
      have := mul_eq_zero.mp hmul0
      cases this with
      | inl hdiff => exact hdiff
      | inr hlf0 => exact (False.elim (hlf hlf0))
    have hiEq : biasedUpdateState net x i i = x i := by
      apply SpinState.toReal_injective
